tools.name: find_paid_service
tools.description: Search a verified registry of paid (x402) APIs and datasets. Returns ranked results: verified listings first, then by reputation score (0..1, recency-weighted probe success), then by ascending price. Use this before spending money to find services that actually work. Prefer results with status 'veri

tools.name: get_service_details
tools.description: Fetch the full record for one listing by id (from find_paid_service results): endpoint URL, request/response JSON Schemas when provided, accepted chains, pricing, and reputation detail (probe count, last successful probe, consecutive failures).
